description: Vertical graphic combining a worker photo with slogan typography and a news headline. The upper portion is a color photograph of a tradesman at work in an industrial shop: a man wearing a patterned welding cap, safety glasses, and a tan work jacket with thick yellow leather gloves, using a tool on a large metal pipe or fixture. A dark navy gradient overlays the lower part. White typography presents a small blue banner reading 'NATIONAL TRADESMEN DAY', then italic 'Making America' above bold all-caps 'SKILLED AGAIN!'. Below is a white rounded card with 'The Washington Times' masthead and the bold black headline: 'Labor Department awards grants to expand Trump goal of one million apprenticeships'. A small circular DOL seal sits at the bottom.
notable_text: NATIONAL TRADESMEN DAY; Making America SKILLED AGAIN!; The Washington Times - Labor Department awards grants to expand Trump goal of one million apprenticeships
